summary: SEO & Google Indexing Readiness Testing - All 27 backend tests PASSED, all frontend tests PASSED. Sitemap.xml returns 125 URLs using production domain (www.visionary-suite.com). Robots.txt has correct Allow/Disallow rules. JSON-LD structured data present in index.html. All pages (Landing, Blog, Explore, Pricing) load with proper Helmet meta tags.

details: Valid XML with urlset root element
All URLs use production domain www.visionary-suite.com
URLs have proper structure (loc, lastmod, changefreq, priority)
JSON-LD script tags present in index.html
Landing page loads with correct title: 'Visionary Suite | AI Content Creator for Viral Reels & Kids Stories'
Landing page has canonical URL: https://www.visionary-suite.com
Blog page loads with title: 'Visionary Suite Blog | AI Video Creation Tips & Guides'
Explore page loads with title: 'Explore Stories | Visionary Suite'
Pricing page loads with title: 'Pricing | Visionary Suite - AI Story Video Creator'
Landing.js uses react-helmet-async with title, description, canonical, og:title, og:description, og:url, og:type
Blog.js uses react-helmet-async with title, description, canonical, og:title, og:description, og:url
ExplorePage.js uses react-helmet-async with title, description, canonical, og:title, og:description, og:url
Pricing.js uses react-helmet-async with title, description, canonical, og:title, og:description, og:url

critical_code_review_comments: FRONTEND_URL in backend/.env correctly set to https://www.visionary-suite.com
Sitemap dynamically generates URLs from database (pipeline_jobs, shares, story_series, blog posts)
Static robots.txt in frontend/public/ serves as backup
All SEO endpoints use production domain exclusively - no preview URLs leak

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load with correct meta tags)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO implementation verified: sitemap.xml at /api/public/sitemap.xml returns 125 URLs, robots.txt at /api/public/robots.txt has correct rules, JSON-LD structured data in index.html, all frontend pages have Helmet meta tags. All URLs use production domain www.visionary-suite.com.
